{{Infobox character
| name = Lirin's father
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lirin's father]] has black-and-white eyes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39">''Waybound'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lirin's father]] has a [[workshop]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lirin's father]] makes the best gifts.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
